name: legacy project without conversation_mode field → buildProjectState returns PIPELINE (B3 backward compat — PHASE-16 UNIFIED)
description: RED (before B3 fix): buildProjectState returns conversation_mode:undefined for old projects (no fallback) → state_field_is_pipeline=false → FAIL. GREEN (after B3 fix): '|| PIPELINE' fallback applied → conversation_mode:'PIPELINE' in response.project → PASS.
